title: AI Trading Agent Delivers +105% Annualized Return, 90% Profitable Trades, and Profit Factor 4.5
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **NEW YORK MILLS, N.Y.** \- **Sept. 8, 2025** \- [Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/), a leader in AI-driven financial tools, today announced exceptional trading results from its AI Trading Agent focused on Hubbell Incorporated (HUBB). The agent, operating on a 5-minute timeframe, delivered a +105% annualized return, starting from an initial balance of $100,000. With $12,505 in closed trades profit and loss (P/L), each trade sized at $10,000, the strategy showcased 66 profitable trades out of 73 total, achieving a 90% success rate and a robust 3.2 profit factor.
